nasb.text: After they had preached the gospel to that city and had made many disciples, they returned to Lystra and to Iconium and to Antioch,

esv.text: When they had preached the gospel to that city and had made many disciples, they returned to Lystra and to Iconium and to Antioch,

cnv.text: 他們在那城裡傳福音，使許多人作了門徒，然後回到路司得、以哥念、安提阿，

ccb.text: 他们向那里的人传福音，有很多人做了门徒。然后，他们又回到路司得、以哥念和安提阿，

csbs.text: 保罗和巴拿巴在代尔贝城传了福音，使许多人成为门徒以后，回到路司得、以哥念、安提阿，
